describe.example: Can you describe the man you saw?
describe.example_zh: 你能描述一下你看到的那個男子嗎？

description.example: She gave a clear description of the place.
description.example_zh: 她對那個地方做了清楚的描述。

desert.example: Few plants grow in the dry desert.
desert.example_zh: 乾燥的沙漠裡幾乎沒有植物生長。

desert.example: He deserted his friends when they needed him.
desert.example_zh: 朋友需要他時他卻棄之不顧。

design.example_zh: 她設計了一件漂亮的洋裝。

design.example: The vase has a flower design.

detail.example: Please tell me the details of the plan.
detail.example_zh: 請告訴我這個計畫的細節。

develop.example: Children develop quickly in their first year.
develop.example_zh: 孩子在第一年發育得很快。

develop.example: The company developed a new app.
develop.example_zh: 這家公司開發了一款新的應用程式。

dial.example: Dial this number to reach the office.
dial.example_zh: 撥這個號碼可以聯絡辦公室。

dial.example: The clock has a large dial.

dialogue.example: The two leaders began a dialogue.

diamond.example: The ring has a shiny diamond.
diamond.example_zh: 這枚戒指上有顆閃亮的鑽石。

diamond.example: The kite is shaped like a diamond.

diary.example: She writes in her diary every night.

diet.example: A healthy diet keeps you strong.
She is on a diet to lose weight.

difference.example: There is a big difference between them.
difference.example_zh: 它們之間有很大的差別。

difficulty.example: He had difficulty understanding the lesson.

direct.example: Is there a direct flight to Tokyo?
She directed us to the station.

direction.example: We walked in the wrong direction.
Follow the directions on the box.

director.example: The director made a great movie.
director.example_zh: 這位導演拍了一部很棒的電影。

director.example: She is the director of the company.

disappear.example: The sun disappeared behind the clouds.

discover.example_zh: 科學家發現了一顆新行星。

discovery.example_zh: 這個發現讓所有人都驚訝。

discuss.example: We discussed the plan after dinner.
discuss.example_zh: 我們晚餐後討論了這個計畫。

discussion.example: The class had a lively discussion.
discussion.example_zh: 全班進行了熱烈的討論。

display.example: The toys were on display in the window.

distance.example: The distance to school is two kilometers.
distance.example_zh: 到學校的距離是兩公里。

distant.example_zh: 我們可以看見遠處的群山。

divide.example: Divide the cake into six pieces.
Ten divided by two is five.

division.example: We learned division in math class.
division.example_zh: 我們在數學課學了除法。

division.example: He works in the sales division.

domestic.example: We took a domestic flight to Kaohsiung.
domestic.example_zh: 我們搭國內班機去高雄。

domestic.example: Cats and dogs are domestic animals.

dot.example: Put a dot at the end of the line.

double.example: He ordered a double serving of rice.

doubt.example: I have no doubt that you can do it.
I doubt that he will come.

dove.example: A white dove is a symbol of peace.

download.example: I downloaded a new song to my phone.
download.example_zh: 我下載了一首新歌到手機。

dragon.example: The story is about a brave dragon.
dragon.example_zh: 這個故事是關於一條勇敢的龍。

drama.example: She acts in a school drama.
drama.example_zh: 她在學校的戲劇中演出。

drawer.example: The socks are in the top drawer.
drawer.example_zh: 襪子在最上面的抽屜裡。

drawing.example: Her drawing of the cat is lovely.

drug.example: The doctor gave him some drugs.
Taking drugs is harmful and illegal.

dryer.example: I put the wet towels in the dryer.
dryer.example_zh: 我把濕毛巾放進烘乾機。

due.example: The report is due on Friday.
The game was canceled due to rain.

dull.example: The lesson was long and dull.
The knife is too dull to cut.

duty.example: It is a soldier's duty to protect people.
duty.example_zh: 保護人民是軍人的職責。

duty.example: The nurse is on duty tonight.

eagle.example: The eagle flew high in the sky.

earn.example: She earns money by teaching piano.

earring.example: She wore a pair of gold earrings.

earthquake.example: The earthquake shook the whole city.

ease.example: She solved the puzzle with ease.

eastern.example: They live in the eastern part of the country.
eastern.example_zh: 他們住在這個國家的東部。

edge.example: Don't stand too close to the edge.
The knife has a sharp edge.

edition.example: This is the latest edition of the book.
edition.example_zh: 這是這本書的最新版本。

education.example_zh: 教育對每個人都很重要。

effect.example: The medicine had a quick effect.

effective.example: Exercise is an effective way to stay fit.
effective.example_zh: 運動是保持健康的有效方法。

effort.example: She passed the exam through hard effort.

elder.example: My elder brother is a teacher.

electrical.example: There was an electrical problem in the house.

emotion.example: She tried to control her emotions.
emotion.example_zh: 她試著控制自己的情緒。
